core_mechanism: an excluded-volume/blockade constraint that forbids two excitations within a critical range, driving self-organization into regularly spaced ordered patterns with a discrete staircase of quantized plateaus (commensurate configurations) as a control parameter is adiabatically swept
brief_reason: The abstract describes an excitation-number staircase whose steps are crystalline states of regularly spaced excitations produced by a blockade that prevents nearby excitations, selectively reached by chirped (adiabatic sweep) driving.
